cookie.message: We use cookies to analyse traffic and improve your experience.

sections.heading: 1. General
sections.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Property Hub ("we", "our", "us") handles information when you visit our website. We do not collect personal data through forms or accounts. However, we use third-party analytics tools that may collect certain technical data automatically.

sections.heading: 2. Google Analytics
sections.body:
We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our website. Google Analytics collects anonymised information such as:
• Your IP address (anonymised)
• Browser type and version
• Pages visited and time spent
• Referring website

This data is processed by Google LLC and subject to Google's Privacy Policy (policies.google.com). We do not have access to personally identifiable information through Analytics.

sections.heading: 3. Cookies
sections.body:
Google Analytics sets the following cookies:
• _ga — distinguishes unique users, expires after 2 years
• _ga_* — maintains session state, expires after 2 years

These cookies are only set after you give your consent via the cookie banner. You may withdraw consent at any time by clearing your browser cookies.

sections.heading: 4. Your choices
sections.body: You can decline cookie tracking via the banner shown on your first visit. You can also opt out of Google Analytics tracking at any time using the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on available at tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.

sections.heading: 5. Data retention
sections.body: Analytics data is retained by Google for up to 26 months. We do not store any personal data on our own servers.

sections.heading: 6. Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

sections.heading: 7. Contact
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us via the Property Hub platform.

hero.title: Access to exclusive real estate deals
hero.subtitle: Special prices, bonuses and discounts from developers — through the Property Hub partner platform.

about.label: About the platform
paragraphs: Property Hub — is a partner referral platform in the real estate sector.
We obtain special (closed) conditions from developers and open them to our partners.
You recommend the best properties to your clients under the same conditions that are usually unavailable on the open market.
cards: You don't need to be a broker. Your role — is a recommendation.
The deal is fully managed by the developer's sales department.

howItWorks.title: How it works
steps: You recommend a property or project and explain its value to the client
You send the client your personal referral link or code to submit a request
The client submits a request — the system records who referred them
The developer's sales department contacts the client and manages the deal fully: negotiations, documents, support
Once the deal is closed, you receive your referral fee

earnings.title: How much can you earn

tiers.desc: of the deal value, for deals you closed directly.
of partner deals from people you invited.

earnings.note: Rates may vary depending on the project. Fees are paid after successful deal closure.
earnings.whyTitle: Why we don't compete with partners
whyPoints: We have no direct sales — we don't take your clients.
To get access, the client must go through your referral link and submit a request.
Without a link or code the client cannot use these conditions.
New partners can only register by invitation.
This system protects you from bypass and client loss.

forWho.title: Who this platform is for
cards: If you have people interested in buying real estate (friends, networks, social media, clients)
If you don't want to become a broker, but want to earn on referrals
If you need a simple process: referral → request → deal → reward

important.title: Important
items: This is not a staffing or employment contract.
We don't promise a fixed income — payments are made only after a successful deal.
Do not take money from clients — we are not a fund, brokerage or investment advisor.
You recommend and refer — all other work is done by the developer's department and licensed specialists.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Access projects and start earning on referrals today
